name: prodigy-ui
description: Animated UI components for modern web applications. Compatible with React 18+ and Next.js 13+.
assetsNote: This library does not bundle images. Components use placeholder images from https://picsum.photos when no images are provided. You can provide your own images via component props.

components.name: stroke-cards
components.title: Stroke Cards
components.description: SVG path-drawing animation with masked image hover reveals. Each card traces its border on hover.

props.name: cards
props.type: Array<{ id: string; imgSrc?: string; imgAlt?: string; title?: string; strokeColor1?: string; strokeColor2?: string; titleColor?: string; borderRadius?: string; className?: string }>
props.description: Array of card objects. Each card has: id (unique identifier), imgSrc (image URL), imgAlt (image alt text), title (hover text), strokeColor1 (primary stroke), strokeColor2 (secondary stroke), titleColor, borderRadius, className

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of cards per row in the grid

props.name: gap
props.description: CSS gap value between cards (e.g., '1rem', '20px')

props.name: padding
props.description: CSS padding around the grid container

props.name: minCardWidth
props.description: Minimum width of each card

props.name: maxCardWidth
props.description: Maximum width of each card

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the container

installSteps.title: Register GSAP Plugin
installSteps.description: Add GSAP plugin registration in your app

components.name: team-section
components.title: Team Section
components.description: Interactive team member showcase with GSAP-powered hover animations. Names animate in on profile hover.

props.name: members
props.type: Array<{ image: string; name: string; imageClassName?: string; imageStyle?: CSSProperties; nameClassName?: string; nameStyle?: CSSProperties }>
props.description: Array of team members. Each member has: image (profile photo URL), name (display name), and optional styling props

props.name: defaultName
props.description: Text displayed when no member is hovered

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color of the section (CSS color value)

props.name: textColor
props.description: Default text color for the name display

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Color of the hovered member's name

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the main container

props.name: hoverScaleFactor
props.description: Scale multiplier when a profile image is hovered

props.name: animDuration
props.description: Animation duration in seconds

props.name: charStagger
props.description: Stagger delay between each character animation

installSteps.title: Register GSAP Plugin
installSteps.description: Add GSAP plugin registration in your app

components.name: gooey-bar
components.title: Gooey Bar
components.description: Animated status bar with gooey SVG filter effects. Hover over items to see fluid morphing animations with tooltips.

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{ id: string; icon: 'music' | 'cube' | 'cloud' | 'wifi' | 'battery' | 'clock' | 'custom'; label?: string; value?: string; customIcon?: ReactNode }>
props.description: Array of status items. Each item has: id (unique identifier), icon (icon type), label/value (display text), customIcon (for 'custom' type)

props.name: renderContent
props.description: Custom renderer for tooltip content

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the tooltip text

props.name: barColor
props.description: Background color of the bar and gooey blob

props.name: iconColor
props.description: Color of the icons

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the outer wrapper

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Tailwind size class for icons

props.name: buttonSize
props.description: Tailwind size class for buttons

props.name: gap
props.description: Tailwind gap class between buttons

props.name: padding
props.description: CSS padding for the main bar

components.name: spring-back-card
components.title: Spring Back Card
components.description: 3D spring physics card that follows cursor movement with smooth lerp interpolation and rotation effects.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom content to render inside the card

props.name: imgSrc
props.description: Image source URL for the card background

props.name: imgAlt
props.description: Alt text for the card image

props.name: widthClass
props.description: Tailwind width class for card size

props.name: heightClass
props.description: Tailwind height class for card size

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for positioning

props.name: initialRotation
props.description: Initial rotation angle in degrees (positive = clockwise)

props.name: interactive
props.description: Enable/disable cursor tracking interaction

props.name: maxRotation
props.description: Maximum rotation angle when following cursor

props.name: lerpSpeed
props.description: Speed of the spring interpolation (lower = smoother but slower)

props.name: mobileVisible
props.description: Whether the card is visible on mobile screens (< 640px)

components.name: more-space-scroll
components.title: More Space Scroll
components.description: Smooth scrolling effect using Lenis with horizontal project showcase. Scroll vertically to move through horizontal content.

props.name: projects
props.type: Array<{ name: string; img: string; year: string }>
props.description: Array of project objects. Each project has: name (project title), img (image URL), year (project year)

props.name: projectsPerRow
props.description: Number of projects to display per row

props.name: totalRows
props.description: Total number of rows to render

installSteps.title: Register GSAP Plugin
Setup Lenis
installSteps.description: Wrap your app with ReactLenis for smooth scrolling

components.name: infinite-contact
components.title: Infinite Contact
components.description: Scroll-triggered infinite contact section with GSAP animations. Contact info animates infinitely as you scroll.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of contact items. Each item has: label (person name/role), value (position/title)

props.name: images
props.description: Array of image URLs for the contact avatars

installSteps.title: Register GSAP Plugins
Setup Lenis
installSteps.description: Wrap your app with ReactLenis for smooth scrolling

components.name: infinite-slider
components.title: Infinite Slider
components.description: Arc-shaped infinite image slider with GSAP scroll-triggered animations. Images arranged in a 3D arc perspective.

props.name: images
props.description: Array of image URLs for the slides

props.name: titles
props.description: Array of title strings displayed below the slider

props.name: slideCount
props.description: Number of slide duplicates for infinite scrolling effect

components.name: pixel-image
components.title: Pixel Image
components.description: Pixelated image reveal animation. Image dissolves from coarse pixels to clear after certain delay.

props.name: src
props.description: Image source URL

props.name: pxSteps
props.description: Pixelation steps array

props.name: triggerStart
props.description: Scroll trigger start position

props.name: speed
props.description: Animation duration in seconds

props.name: intialDelay
props.description: Initial delay before animation

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes

props.name: loop
props.description: Whether animation repeats

props.name: loopTimes
props.description: Number of loop iterations

props.name: loopDelay
props.description: Delay between loop iterations

components.name: glowing-light
components.title: Glowing Light
components.description: Lottie-powered glowing light effect that tracks cursor movement with spotlight and mask animations.

props.name: lottiePath
props.description: Path to the Lottie JSON animation file

installSteps.title: Setup Lenis
installSteps.description: Wrap your app with ReactLenis for smooth scrolling

components.name: split-cards
components.title: Split Cards
components.description: Scroll-triggered 3D card flip animation with gap and width transitions. Cards flip to reveal content on scroll.

props.name: cards
props.type: Array<{ id: string; frontImage: string; backTitle: string; backDescription: string }>
props.description: Array of exactly 3 card objects. Each card has: id (unique identifier), frontImage (URL for front side - recommended aspect ratio per image is 5/7, total 15/7 for all 3), backTitle (title shown on back flip), backDescription (description text on back flip)

props.name: introTitle
props.description: Title text for the intro section

props.name: headerTitle
props.description: Title text for the sticky header section

props.name: outroTitle
props.description: Title text for the outro section

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the outer container

installSteps.title: Install Dependencies
installSteps.description: Install gsap and lenis packages for animations and smooth scrolling

installSteps.title: Register GSAP Plugin
Setup Lenis
installSteps.description: Wrap your app with ReactLenis for smooth scrolling
